title: DonutExtras
description: DonutSMP QOL Mod For viewing stats and more!
body: ![DonutExtras Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/357a9be22179562c47cbf1fe133d477472779754.png) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/479d04c89049608d2a34b3e77c9a5857c149b815.png) ### DonutSMP Stats Display - Display DonutSMP users stats above thier IGN - Supports [Text Placeholder API Formatting](https://placeholders.pb4.eu/user/quicktext/) - Supports placeholders: {name} {name_unformatted} {money} {shards} {sell_money} {shop_money} {deaths} {kills} ### Payment Doubling Option - When enabled, at the end of each DonutSMP payment there will be a [D] which when clicked, loads the command to double the money they paid you. - Useful for people who gamble alot on DonutSMP and are slower typers ### Auctions - A simple keybind to start an auction which detects the highest payment and shows in chat - Good-looking and movable HUD ### Look-Pay Feature - Another simple keybind when clicked, will load up the command to pay the player you are currently looking - Amount to pay is configurable ### Auto auction stack - Automatically adds "stack" to the end of any auction command - eg. /ah sea pickle will actually run /ah sea pickle stack ### Faster gear buying - Replaces /ah maxed chestplate with /ah prot 4 unb 3 mend chestplate and same for every other armor type - Also supports things like /ah maxed neth chestplate ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/479d04c89049608d2a34b3e77c9a5857c149b815.png) Using an API Key isn't needed but you **will** need to put one in for DonutSMP Stats viewer - Firstly you need to do /api to get an API Key for accessing DonutSMP Stats - Then go to the DonutExtras config via Mod Menu - Click save and you are all ready to start using DonutExtras! **The reason that DonutSMP tells you to keep this API Key safe is simply because they dont want 2 users using the same api key** ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/479d04c89049608d2a34b3e77c9a5857c149b815.png) ### DonutSMP API Key - Shown in setup above ### Enable Payment Double Option - A toggle for the Payment Double Option ### Auction Timer Length - Quite self-explanatory, The length of an auction ### Stats Display Format - How users IGNs are shown - Must contain {name} or {name_unformatted} (name unformatted is the players name but without formatting) - Can support [Text Placeholder API Formatting](https://placeholders.pb4.eu/user/quicktext/) ### Look-Pay Amount - The amount of money the Look-Pay command pays ### DonutSMP Stats Refresh Speed - Quite a complicated one, Its the speed at which users stats get refreshed. - Due to the 250 reqs/min limit There is a note below showing the amount of players it can load stats for (Closest players including you) ### Auto auction stack - A toggle for the auto auction stack feature ### Faster Gear buying - A toggle for the faster gear buying feature ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/479d04c89049608d2a34b3e77c9a5857c149b815.png) ### Look pay key - Checks if you are looking at a player and if so, will load the command to pay them a configurable amount - Quite useful for streamers who rate bases ### Open Auction Hud Moving Screen - Opens a screen to move where the auction hud is ### Start auction - Starts an auction to count the highest payment - The HUD is movable using the keybind shown above ### Pick auction - A keybind which when pressed opens the auction for the block you are looking at (supports loaded schematics)
